zh.Buckenham, Norfolk, England: 英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes de Beyle於大約1290年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德時，她的父親William De Beyle13歲，母親Agnes11歲。她於大約1327年與Sir Thomas Grey I在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德海頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世在她的家鄉，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德希頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes de Beyle于大约1290年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德时，她的父亲William De Beyle13岁，母亲Agnes11岁。她于大约1327年与Sir Thomas Grey I在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德海頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世在她的家乡，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德希頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Beyle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Declan, Fergus, John Patrick, Padraic, Seamus, Aileen, Brigid, Cathal, Colm, Conn.
Irish (Donegal): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Baoighill ‘descendant of Baoigheall’, a personal name of uncertain meaning, perhaps from baoth ‘rash’ + geall ‘pledge’.

Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Biéville, near Caen, Normandy, formerly Boiavilla. The Boyle earls of Glasgow, lords of Kelburne (Ayrshire) are descended from Adam son of Gilbert son of Richer de Boiville. In 12th-century England, men named de Boiville held land in Millom and Saint Bees, Cumberland, and were associated with grants of land in Gloucestershire.

variants.name: Boal
meanings: Irish (Down and Antrim): from Ó Baoighill, see Boyle .
English (Durham): possibly a variant of   Bowell  , if it is not the Irish name.
Spanish: habitational name from a little town called Boal in Asturias.

variants.name: Bole
meanings: Irish: possibly a variant of   Boyle  .
Altered form of German   Bohle   or   Bolle  .

variants.name: Boyles
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): variant of Boyle 2, with post-medieval excrescent -s.
Irish: variant of Boyle 1, with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes de Beyle was born about 1290, in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, William De Beyle, was 13 and her mother, Agnes, was 11. She married Sir Thomas Grey I about 1327, in Hetton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died in her hometown, and was buried in Heaton, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes de Beyle est née environ 1290, à Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William De Beyle, avait 13 ans et sa mère, Agnes, avait 11 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Grey I environ 1327, à Hetton, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée dans sa ville natale, et a été enterrée à Heaton, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes de Beyle um 1290 in Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William De Beyle 13 und ihre Mutter Agnes 11. Sie hat um 1327 in Hetton, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom Sir Thomas Grey I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Heaton, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Beyle è nata il circa 1290 nel Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William De Beyle, aveva 13 anni e sua madre, Agnes, aveva 11 anni. Lei sposato Sir Thomas Grey I circa 1327, nel Hetton, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolta a Heaton, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes de Beyleが約1290年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドで生まれた時，父William De Beyleは13歳，母Agnesは11歳であった。約1327年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドヘットオンでSir Thomas Grey Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は故郷で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドヒートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes de Beyle(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William De Beyle(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes(은)는 11세였다. 그녀는 대략 1327년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 헤턴에서 Sir Thomas Grey I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 그녀의 고향에서 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 히턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes de Beyle nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William De Beyle, tinha 13 anos e sua mãe, Agnes, tinha 11 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Grey I aproximadamente 1327, em Hetton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultada em Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes de Beyle родилась около 1290 г. в местности нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William De Beyle было 13 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes, 11. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Grey I около 1327 г. в местности хеттон, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла в её родном городе и была похоронена в местности хитон, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Agnes de Beyle nació aproximadamente 1290, en Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William De Beyle, tenía 13 años y su mamá, Agnes, tenía 11 años. Se casó con Sir Thomas Grey I aproximadamente 1327, en Hetton, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió en su pueblo, y fue sepultada en Heaton, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
